scripts.setup-workspace: npm install && bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; main_worktree=$(git worktree list --porcelain | sed -n "1s/^worktree //p"); asset_source="$main_worktree/assets"; if [ ! -d "$asset_source" ]; then echo "Error: assets folder not found in main worktree at $asset_source"; exit 1; fi; if [ -L assets ]; then echo "assets symlink already exists, pointing to $(readlink assets)"; elif [ -e assets ]; then echo "Error: assets already exists as a real file or directory"; exit 1; else ln -s "$asset_source" assets; echo "Symlinked assets -> $asset_source"; fi; env_source="$main_worktree/.env"; if [ -f "$env_source" ]; then if [ -e .env ]; then echo ".env already exists, skipping"; else cp "$env_source" .env; echo "Copied .env from $env_source"; fi; else echo ".env not found in main worktree, skipping"; fi'
